## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Siit and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance, and next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/xzKzxPa8U96FieuGEgacqEwYBSCQwU1s?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Siit experiencing decline across channels; new PPC campaign launched](https://fathom.video/share/xzKzxPa8U96FieuGEgacqEwYBSCQwU1s?tab=summary&timestamp=129.0)
  - [Shifting focus to bottom-of-funnel content, including comparison pages and use cases](https://fathom.video/share/xzKzxPa8U96FieuGEgacqEwYBSCQwU1s?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Implementing long-form content (2000-3000 words) to test performance against shorter pieces](https://fathom.video/share/xzKzxPa8U96FieuGEgacqEwYBSCQwU1s?tab=summary&timestamp=562.0)
  - [Developing backlink program to improve domain authority and AI search visibility](https://fathom.video/share/xzKzxPa8U96FieuGEgacqEwYBSCQwU1s?tab=summary&timestamp=1164.0)
  - [Launching closed beta for AI agents on Monday, with trade show attendance next week](https://fathom.video/share/xzKzxPa8U96FieuGEgacqEwYBSCQwU1s?tab=summary&timestamp=1585.0)

## Topics

### Performance Overview

  - [Traffic, demos, and key page visits down across channels](https://fathom.video/share/xzKzxPa8U96FieuGEgacqEwYBSCQwU1s?tab=summary&timestamp=167.0)
  - [No significant changes made, except for Carmel's recent absence](https://fathom.video/share/xzKzxPa8U96FieuGEgacqEwYBSCQwU1s?tab=summary&timestamp=135.0)
  - [New PPC campaign launched this week](https://fathom.video/share/xzKzxPa8U96FieuGEgacqEwYBSCQwU1s?tab=summary&timestamp=146.0)
  - [Possible impacts: website changes affecting Google indexing, decrease in French traffic due to lack of localization](https://fathom.video/share/xzKzxPa8U96FieuGEgacqEwYBSCQwU1s?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)

### Content Strategy Shift

  - [Moving towards bottom-of-funnel focus](https://fathom.video/share/xzKzxPa8U96FieuGEgacqEwYBSCQwU1s?tab=summary&timestamp=291.0)
  - [Exploring creative ways to reach target audience](https://fathom.video/share/xzKzxPa8U96FieuGEgacqEwYBSCQwU1s?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Leveraging existing YouTube content, embedding short videos in blogs](https://fathom.video/share/xzKzxPa8U96FieuGEgacqEwYBSCQwU1s?tab=summary&timestamp=326.0)
  - [Repurposing LinkedIn Live content into blog posts and supporting articles](https://fathom.video/share/xzKzxPa8U96FieuGEgacqEwYBSCQwU1s?tab=summary&timestamp=370.0)

### Long-form Content Implementation

  - [Testing 5 long-form (2000-3000 words) and 5 current-length pieces this week](https://fathom.video/share/xzKzxPa8U96FieuGEgacqEwYBSCQwU1s?tab=summary&timestamp=562.0)
  - [Focus on comparison pages (e.g., Jira Service Management, Fresh Service)](https://fathom.video/share/xzKzxPa8U96FieuGEgacqEwYBSCQwU1s?tab=summary&timestamp=524.0)
  - [Maintaining glossary terms for top-of-funnel and interlinking](https://fathom.video/share/xzKzxPa8U96FieuGEgacqEwYBSCQwU1s?tab=summary&timestamp=578.0)

### Brand Authority and Backlinks

  - [Current low domain authority; working on improvement](https://fathom.video/share/xzKzxPa8U96FieuGEgacqEwYBSCQwU1s?tab=summary&timestamp=979.0)
  - [Implementing backlink program: 3-5 backlinks/week from high DA (50-100) sites](https://fathom.video/share/xzKzxPa8U96FieuGEgacqEwYBSCQwU1s?tab=summary&timestamp=1094.0)
  - [Focusing on YouTube and LinkedIn for brand building](https://fathom.video/share/xzKzxPa8U96FieuGEgacqEwYBSCQwU1s?tab=summary&timestamp=1016.0)
  - [Considering PR for broader publication reach](https://fathom.video/share/xzKzxPa8U96FieuGEgacqEwYBSCQwU1s?tab=summary&timestamp=1057.0)

### AI and Search Optimization

  - [Optimizing content for AI search engines (e.g., ChatGPT using Bing)](https://fathom.video/share/xzKzxPa8U96FieuGEgacqEwYBSCQwU1s?tab=summary&timestamp=1144.0)
  - [Exploring markdown formatting for better AI pickup, especially on product pages](https://fathom.video/share/xzKzxPa8U96FieuGEgacqEwYBSCQwU1s?tab=summary&timestamp=1418.0)
  - [Leveraging Reddit for authority building and AI training data](https://fathom.video/share/xzKzxPa8U96FieuGEgacqEwYBSCQwU1s?tab=summary&timestamp=1366.0)

### Upcoming Initiatives

  - [Closed beta launch for AI agents on Monday](https://fathom.video/share/xzKzxPa8U96FieuGEgacqEwYBSCQwU1s?tab=summary&timestamp=1585.0)
  - [Attending IT trade show in London next week](https://fathom.video/share/xzKzxPa8U96FieuGEgacqEwYBSCQwU1s?tab=summary&timestamp=1633.0)
  - [New product video and landing page in development](https://fathom.video/share/xzKzxPa8U96FieuGEgacqEwYBSCQwU1s?tab=summary&timestamp=1604.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Carmel to send list of priority keywords for backlinking](https://fathom.video/share/xzKzxPa8U96FieuGEgacqEwYBSCQwU1s?tab=summary&timestamp=1749.0)
  - [Carmel to record Loom video for glossary updates and highlight areas for improvement](https://fathom.video/share/xzKzxPa8U96FieuGEgacqEwYBSCQwU1s?tab=summary&timestamp=1493.0)
  - [Team to brainstorm support ideas for closed beta launch and trade show](https://fathom.video/share/xzKzxPa8U96FieuGEgacqEwYBSCQwU1s?tab=summary&timestamp=1508.0)
  - [Reschedule next week's meeting to Friday for more comprehensive coverage](https://fathom.video/share/xzKzxPa8U96FieuGEgacqEwYBSCQwU1s?tab=summary&timestamp=1792.0)
  - [Carmel to share PPC strategy file and add team to PostHog for data access](https://fathom.video/share/xzKzxPa8U96FieuGEgacqEwYBSCQwU1s?tab=summary&timestamp=1755.0)
  - [GrowthX to review new PPC specialist's reporting and data](https://fathom.video/share/xzKzxPa8U96FieuGEgacqEwYBSCQwU1s?tab=summary&timestamp=1734.0)
